title: moltkia × intermedia
intro: Moltkia × intermedia, also known as Intermediate Forget-me-not, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the European Forget-me-not (Myosotis latifolia) and the Alpine Forget-me-not (Myosotis alpestris). The plant has been found to contain medicinal properties, including flavonoids and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and flowers of Moltkia × intermedia can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and teas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
